ddls:
CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the series */,
  "network" TEXT /* Network the episode aired on */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season number of the episode */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the episode */,
  "imdb_rating" REAL /* IMDB rating of the episode */,
  "engagement" INTEGER /* Number of engagements */,
  "date_aired" TEXT /* Air date of the episode */,
  "run_time" INTEGER /* Runtime of the episode in minutes */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the episode (e.g., TV Series) */,
  "episode_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the episode content */,
  "writer" TEXT /* The name of the writer(s) of the episode */,
  "director" TEXT /* The name of the director of the episode */,
  "production_code" TEXT /* The unique production code for the episode */,
  "airing_time" TEXT /* The time of day when the episode was aired */,
  "rerun_count" INTEGER /* The number of times the episode has been rerun */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monsters" (
  "monster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monster */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode this monster appears in */,
  "monster_name" TEXT /* Name of the monster */,
  "monster_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the monster */,
  "monster_type" TEXT /* Type of the monster (e.g., Ghost, Ancient) */,
  "monster_subtype" TEXT /* Subtype of the monster (e.g., Suit, Phantom) */,
  "monster_species" TEXT /* Species of the monster (e.g., Human, Object) */,
  "is_real" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the monster is real */,
  "monster_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of this type of monster appearing */,
  "monster_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the monster */,
  "monster_origin" TEXT /* The origin or backstory of the monster */,
  "monster_crimes" TEXT /* The crimes or misdeeds committed by the monster */,
  "monster_weakness" TEXT /* The weaknesses of the monster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("monster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monsters_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action entry */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode in which the action occurred */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character performing the action */,
  "caught" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the character caught a monster */,
  "captured" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the character captured a monster */,
  "unmasked" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the character unmasked a monster */,
  "snacked" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the character snacked during the episode */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* The type of action (e.g., chase, confrontation) */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the action */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* The time during the episode when the action occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_actions_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suspects" (
  "suspect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suspect record */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode this suspect appears in */,
  "suspect_name" TEXT /* Name of the suspect */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the suspect */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount of suspects in this episode */,
  "motive" TEXT /* Motive behind the suspect's actions */,
  "suspect_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the suspect */,
  "suspect_background" TEXT /* The background or history of the suspect */,
  "suspect_crimes" TEXT /* The crimes or misdeeds committed by the suspect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suspect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suspects_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "culprits" (
  "culprit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each culprit record */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode in which the culprit was revealed */,
  "culprit_name" TEXT /* Name of the culprit */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the culprit */,
  "culprit_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of culprits in this episode */,
  "motive" TEXT /* Motive behind the culprit's actions */,
  "if_it_wasnt_for" TEXT /* Phrase indicating if it wasn't for a character */,
  "and_that" TEXT /* Additional context or notes about the culprit */,
  "culprit_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the culprit */,
  "culprit_background" TEXT /* The background or history of the culprit */,
  "culprit_crimes" TEXT /* The crimes or misdeeds committed by the culprit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("culprit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_culprits_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gags" (
  "gag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gag record */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode this gag appears in */,
  "door_gag" TEXT /* Description of the door gag used in the episode */,
  "number_of_snacks" INTEGER /* Number of snacks consumed in the episode */,
  "gag_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the gag */,
  "gag_time" TEXT /* The time during the episode when the gag occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gags_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voice_actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voice actor */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character voiced */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor providing the voice */,
  "character_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the character */,
  "actor_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "captured_characters" (
  "capture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each capture record */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode in which the character was captured */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character captured */,
  "captured" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the character was captured */,
  "capture_time" TEXT /* The time during the episode when the character was captured */,
  "capture_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the capture event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_captured_characters_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting record */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode this setting relates to */,
  "terrain" TEXT /* Type of terrain featured in the episode */,
  "country_state" TEXT /* Country and state where the episode is set */,
  "suspects_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of suspects involved in the episode */,
  "setting_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the setting */,
  "setting_weather" TEXT /* The weather conditions during the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "another_mystery" (
  "mystery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mystery record */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode in which the mystery is tracked */,
  "solved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if another mystery was solved */,
  "mystery_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the additional mystery */,
  "mystery_solution" TEXT /* The solution to the additional mystery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mystery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_another_mystery_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the role */,
  "access_levels" TEXT /* The access levels associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
